description: Higher-level insights derived from observations, used to guide future decisions

insights.insight: Cost optimization should focus on SDR agents first -- they run 24x/day vs CEO 6x/day. A 10% token reduction in SDR prompts saves more than a 30% reduction in CEO prompts.

The template system separates concerns well: template/ for reusable patterns, examples/ for specific businesses. New features should follow this pattern -- add to template first, then demonstrate in an example.
